events.title: SHARK SIDE OF THE MOON (stream)
events.description: Connor's Bday movie pick. Group streams Shark Side of the Moon (2022, 1h28m, Thriller/Action): decades ago the USSR developed unkillable sharks and launched them to the moon; today a team of American astronauts endures the fight of their lives.

events.title: UNCLE BOONMEE WHO CAN RECALL HIS PAST LIVES (2010) (stream)
events.description: Apichatpong Weerasethakul's Palme d'Or winner (1h54m, Fantasy/Drama, Thai/Lao with English subtitles). A man dying of kidney disease spends his last days with family, including the ghost of his wife and a forest spirit who used to be his son, on a rural northern Thailand farm.

events.title: Dinner & A Movie: HER PRIVATE HELL
events.venue: Regal UA King of Prussia, 300 Goddard Blvd, King of Prussia
events.description: Watch the new sci-fi/horror Her Private Hell (2026, 1h50m) together, dinner/drinks after (dinner sign-up via Discord). A troubled young woman searches for her father as a mysterious mist engulfs a futuristic metropolis.

events.title: Widow's Bay - Season 1 (Ep 8-10) (stream)
events.description: Weekly Sunday stream of Widow's Bay Season 1 (2026, Comedy/Horror). A New England mayor trying to boost tourism on his island must navigate strange events suggesting it might be cursed. This week: episodes 8-10.
